summary: Deposit function on Ethereum did not check non-zero msg.value, while the destination chain blindly minted xETH proportional to the deposit log, allowing infinite mint with zero collateral.
attack_trace: Call deposit() with msg.value = 0 — emits Deposit event with zero amount
Replay safeTransferFrom path treating WETH as native; emit large Deposit log
Mint qXETH on BSC using forged deposit event
root_cause: deposit() used safeTransferFrom on address(0) (legacy ETH path) without sentinel guard, so attackers used WETH events to mint without backing.
